# ParagonBoundWidget constructor

A scene widget that binds ≥1 real atlas texture handle: its name, class id, and the bound layers (handle + decoded rect + alpha) regardless of binding shape (0x22 field or the 0x58 block). Raw + complete; the consumer assigns role/state.
